_readme: APPROVED recipe: every knob pinned (a later generic-default change cannot restyle this look). starcomb resolution: CLI > this file > GENERIC.

notes.starless_denoise: off is the one non-generic pin, measured: the post-stretch vst crushed this target's object chroma -47..-50% (the hardest-hit dataset; A/B probe R-G -18.5 -> -9.3; the final render doubles back to -23.4 with off) — off restores it at gate PASS (colour 4.0 / grad 0.9 / blotch 1.2 / rings 1.7)
notes.satu: 0.35/0.5 ladders were run for the SMC's OIII and NOT adopted — satu stays generic 0.2; re-judge the OIII region post-vst-fix before any new satu hypothesis
notes.sep_engine: net pinned with the approval (the approved surfaces are net renders; the earlier provisional deliverable used inpaint)

approved.judgment: results/judgment_smc_denoise_20260710 (denoise-off vs vstpost control; full-frame lossless pairs)
approved.note: approved for the same reason as the M20 fix: vst was destroying moderate-contrast object colour class-wide
